isolation.testingTool: Shell command execution (CLI, go test, go build)
isolation.isolation: No isolation needed - CLI help and tests are read-only

steps.expected: CLI command exists, compiles, and displays help with attestation flags
steps.observed: Command executed successfully with exit code 0. Help output shows all expected flags: --artifact, --blocking, --confidence, --job, --metadata, --method, --nonce, --result, --session, --summary, --supersedes, --verifier-identity, --verifier-kind

steps.action: Search for CreateCheckRecord function definitions using grep
steps.expected: Function exists in service.go and store.go
steps.observed: Found 3 function definitions: Service.CreateCheckRecord (service.go:776), Service.CreateCheckRecordDirect (service.go:1024), Store.CreateCheckRecord (store.go:4236). All definitions present and properly typed.

steps.expected: CLI command exists and displays help with check creation flags
steps.observed: Command executed successfully with exit code 0. Help output shows all expected flags: --build-ok, --checker-model, --diff-stat, --notes, --result, --screenshots, --test-output, --tests-failed, --tests-passed, --videos, --worker-model

assertions.title: Build and tests pass after attestation removal

steps.expected: Build completes successfully with exit code 0
steps.observed: Build completed successfully with no errors, exit code 0

steps.action: Run filtered 'go test' (excluding codex and mcpserver packages)
steps.expected: All tests pass with exit code 0
steps.observed: All test packages passed: native (cached), opencode (cached), pi (cached), cli (0.554s), core (cached), events (cached), notify (cached), service (33.655s), store (cached). Exit code 0. No test failures.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-ATTEST-004 confirmed manual attestation CLI (cogent work attest) is preserved and functional. VAL-ATTEST-005 verified CreateCheckRecord function exists in service and store layers, with CLI command (cogent check create) working correctly. VAL-ATTEST-006 confirmed both go build and filtered go test pass completely after attestation removal, with all test packages passing (9 packages tested, 0 failures).
